home.name: Wishayut Chokanantnag
home.title: Computer Engineering & AI Student | Web Developer | Networking Enthusiast
home.description: Building modern web applications while exploring networking and infrastructure. Passionate about routing, MikroTik systems, and designing scalable, real-world solutions.

timeline.title: My Journey
timeline.subtitle: Key milestones in my learning and development

items.title: Microsoft Office Specialist – Word (Associate)
items.description: Earned Microsoft Office Specialist certification and participated in the MOS Olympic competition, gaining real exam and competitive experience.

items.title: Frontend Flutter Developer
items.description: Developed and implemented internationalization (i18n) and built a settings page UI. Delivered a working demo before the project was paused.

items.title: JASSO Scholarship Student
items.description: Awarded a full scholarship to study in Japan. Built a digital door lock system and received validation from Japanese professors.

items.title: AI + IoT Hackathon (Top 10)
items.description: Designed an AI companion system using Raspberry Pi 5 with local LLM (Gemma) and speech processing (STT/TTS), achieving Top 10 placement.

toolkit.title: Technology Stack
toolkit.subtitle: Tools and technologies I use daily

items.title: User-Centered Design
items.description: Every line of code should serve the end user. I prioritize accessibility, performance, and intuitive interfaces that delight users.

items.title: Clean & Maintainable Code
items.description: Writing code is easy; writing readable, maintainable code is an art. I believe in clear documentation, consistent patterns, and thoughtful architecture.

items.title: Continuous Learning
items.description: Technology evolves rapidly. I stay curious, experiment with new tools, and share knowledge with the community through mentoring and open-source contributions.

items.title: Collaboration & Communication
items.description: Great products are built by great teams. I value transparent communication, constructive feedback, and fostering a positive team culture.

footer.status: Currently open to new projects and exciting collaborations.
